# ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindHomeVideos

**Case**

The playlist contains all the user’s home videos in the iTunes library.

## Declaration

```swift
case kindHomeVideos
```

## Distinguished Playlist Kinds

- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindNone**: The playlist isn’t a distinguished playlist.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMovies**: The playlist contains all the movies in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindTVShows**: The playlist contains all the TV shows in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMusic**: The playlist contains all the music items in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindAudiobooks**: The playlist contains all the audiobooks in the iTunes library.
- **kindBooks**: The playlist contains all the audiobooks in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindRingtones**: The playlist contains all the iOS ringtones in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindPodcasts**: The playlist contains all the podcasts in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindVoiceMemos**: The playlist contains all the voice memos in the iTunes library.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindPurchases**: The playlist contains all the user’s purchases from the iTunes Store.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindiTunesU**: The playlist contains all the user’s iTunes U items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kind90sMusic**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s music from the 1990s.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindMyTopRated**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s top rated media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindTop25MostPlayed**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s 25 most played media items.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind.kindRecentlyPlayed**: The default Smart Playlist that iTunes creates of the user’s most recently played media items.
